ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the internet service provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of service offered (e.g., Fiber, Cable, Satellite) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for customer inquiries */,
  "provider_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the service provider */,
  "provider_website" TEXT /* Official website of the service provider */,
  "provider_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer inquiries */,
  "provider_rating" TEXT /* Overall rating of the service provider (e.g., 4.2/5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the provider offering the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the internet plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plan */,
  "download_speed" TEXT /* Maximum download speeds for the plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit for the plan (e.g., 1000 GB) */,
  "contract_duration" INTEGER /* Contract duration for the plan (e.g., 12 months) */,
  "setup_fee" TEXT /* One-time setup fee for the plan */,
  "monthly_fee" TEXT /* Monthly recurring fee for the plan */,
  "speed_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the plan's download speed (e.g., Fast, Faster, Fastest) */,
  "user_rating" TEXT /* User rating of the plan (e.g., 3.5/5) */,
  "order_link" TEXT /* Link to order the plan online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer placing the order */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the internet plan being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer who wrote the review */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the internet plan being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review written by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (from 1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title or summary of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES internet_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_availability" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the internet plan */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the plan is available (e.g., city, state) */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Whether the plan is available in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "region")
)
